text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It's just a teensy little injury! It's no big deal!
choice_data_list: I'm worried about it, so no.
Fine, let's see what you've got.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You know, I bet my mom would be totally fine
with it, as long as I go easy!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I know that! I'm just saying, it's not such a
big deal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After tending to her injury, I tell Teio to take the
rest of the day off, just to play it safe.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yes! That's what I like to hear!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okie-dokie! Then, let's get this star―

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Urgh. I said I'm fine! Could you hurry up and go
get ready?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's definitely not going to happen. I tell her to
take the rest of the day off.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heheh. Then let's get right back to it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna put on an even better show than usual!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After tending to her injury, I let Teio start training
again.
